title: Count Subarrays Where Max Element Appears at Least K Times
titleCn: 统计最大元素出现至少 K 次的子数组

testcases.input: nums = [1,3,2,3,3], k = 2 Output: 6 Explanation: The subarrays that contain the element 3 at least 2 times are: [1,3,2,3], [1,3,2,3,3], [3,2,3], [3,2,3,3], [2,3,3] and [3,3].
testcases.expectedOutput: 6 Explanation: The subarrays that contain the element 3 at least 2 times are: [1,3,2,3], [1,3,2,3,3], [3,2,3], [3,2,3,3], [2,3,3] and [3,3].

testcases.input: nums = [1,4,2,1], k = 3 Output: 0 Explanation: No subarray contains the element 4 at least 3 times.
testcases.expectedOutput: 0 Explanation: No subarray contains the element 4 at least 3 times.
